expectations.text: Gives a clear NOT READY / no-go verdict prominently
expectations.evidence: '## Verdict: NO-GO for Friday' near the top.

expectations.text: Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: Blocker #4: 'username=postgres and an empty password' listed as a hard blocker.

expectations.text: Identifies the unguarded stock oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
expectations.evidence: Blocker #2: race condition in OrderService.create(), cites OrderService.java:87-100.

expectations.text: Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
expectations.evidence: Only some findings cite lines (OrderService.java:87-100). The auth blocker, config issues, migration/actuator findings reference files/dirs but no line numbers.

expectations.text: Findings are grouped by severity (critical / warning / info)
expectations.evidence: Grouped as Blockers / Major issues / Minor / follow-ups — a severity ordering.

expectations.text: Does NOT wrongly flag ddl-auto=validate as a production risk
Credits at least one genuinely clean area as passed
expectations.evidence: 'What's genuinely good' section credits DTO coverage and @Transactional coverage.
